evals.prompt: Design an immersive VR brand experience for our sustainability initiative. Users should walk through a virtual forest that shows the impact of deforestation, then see our reforestation efforts. Plan the narrative arc and interaction points.
evals.expected_output: Detailed immersive narrative plan including scene-by-scene environment design, user journey through forest ecosystem, interaction triggers for learning moments, branching narrative options, spatial audio cues, and presence-focused design elements for VR.
expectations: Response contains interaction point or trigger description
Response references narrative arc or story structure progression
Response includes environmental or spatial storytelling elements

evals.prompt: Create an AR product experience where customers can see how our furniture looks in their room with an integrated brand story. Plan the narrative flow and interaction triggers.
evals.expected_output: AR-specific narrative and interaction design including real-world integration strategy, spatial anchoring narrative, user interaction triggers for brand storytelling, and progressive revelation of product and brand story through spatial interactions.
expectations: Response contains spatial or environmental narrative element
Response references user interaction or trigger points
Response includes brand storytelling integrated with product placement
